#nullable enable

namespace TestNamespace;

public abstract partial record Shape
{
    public TResult Match<TResult>(
        global::System.Func<Circle, TResult> circle,
        global::System.Func<Rectangle, TResult> rectangle)
    {
        return this switch
        {
            Circle __case => circle(__case),
            Rectangle __case => rectangle(__case),
            _ => throw new global::Functorium.Domains.ValueObjects.Unions.UnreachableCaseException(this)
        };
    }

    public void Switch(
        global::System.Action<Circle> circle,
        global::System.Action<Rectangle> rectangle)
    {
        switch (this)
        {
            case Circle __case: circle(__case); break;
            case Rectangle __case: rectangle(__case); break;
            default: throw new global::Functorium.Domains.ValueObjects.Unions.UnreachableCaseException(this);
        }
    }

    public bool IsCircle => this is Circle;
    public bool IsRectangle => this is Rectangle;

    public Circle? AsCircle() => this as Circle;
    public Rectangle? AsRectangle() => this as Rectangle;
}
